home.title: Welcome to MediTrack
home.content: Your personal health and medication tracking application.

about.title: About MediTrack
about.content: Learn more about our application and its features.

support.title: Support Center
support.description: Need help? Send us your complaint or claim and our team will contact you shortly.

doctor.title: Dr.
doctor.phoneHint: Digits only; you may use spaces, +, hyphens, and parentheses.
doctor.specialtyHint: Letters only, with spaces between words (no numbers or symbols).
doctor.ageHint: The physician must be between 31 and 75 years old.
doctor.dragFile: Drag the file into this box
doctor.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this record?
doctor.emailHint: Email will be automatically generated with the institutional domain
doctor.imageUrlError: Must be a valid image URL
doctor.clickToView: Click to view details, double-click to open

unassignPatientDialog.title: Unassign Patient
unassignPatientDialog.message: Do you want to unassign this patient from the doctor? The patient will remain registered in the system.

deleteDoctorDialog.title: Delete Doctor
deleteDoctorDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this doctor? This action cannot be undone.

errors.emailInvalid: is required and must be valid(without spaces)
errors.cannotAssignToCaregiver: This senior citizen is already assigned to a caregiver. Cannot be assigned to a doctor (mutual exclusion).
errors.formInvalidSummary: There are errors in the form. Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
errors.ageTooYoung: The physician must be over 30 years old (minimum age: 31).
errors.ageTooOld: The physician cannot be older than 75.
errors.specialtyInvalidChars: Specialty may only contain letters and spaces between words (no symbols or numbers).
errors.phoneNoLetters: The phone number cannot contain letters.
errors.phoneInvalidChars: The phone number may only include digits and the characters + ( ) - and spaces.
errors.duplicateRegistration: Registration error: a doctor with this name or email is already registered in your organization. Please review the data and try again.
errors.duplicateEmail: A doctor with this email is already registered in your organization. Use a different email or review existing staff.
errors.duplicateFullName: A doctor with the same full name is already registered in your organization. Change the name or review existing staff.
errors.saveFailed: The doctor could not be saved. Check the data or try again.

senior-citizen.imageUrlError: Must be a valid image URL
senior-citizen.dniDigitsMax: DNI must contain digits only, up to 8 characters
senior-citizen.weightRange: Weight must be between 25 and 250 kg
senior-citizen.heightRange: Height must be between 120 and 220 cm
senior-citizen.deviceIdTooLarge: Device ID is too large. Maximum allowed value is {{maxValue}}. Please use a smaller device ID.

errors.invalidBirthDate: The birth date is not valid. Use a real date in YYYY-MM-DD format (not in the future).
errors.invalidBirthDateServer: Registration error: the birth date was not accepted. Enter a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD, reasonable year).
errors.ageOutOfRange: Age from the birth date must be between {{minAge}} and {{maxAge}} years.
errors.noOrganizationContext: No active organization context. Return to the list and try again.
errors.deviceIdInvalid: Device ID must be a positive number.
errors.validationServer: The server rejected the data. Check age (60–120 years), gender (Masculino/Femenino), weight (25–250 kg), height (120–220 cm), and DNI (digits only, max 8).
errors.duplicateDni: A senior citizen with this DNI is already registered in the organization. Use another ID or review the existing record.
errors.duplicateFullName: A senior citizen with the same first and last name already exists in the organization. Change the name or review the existing record.
errors.deviceAlreadyAssigned: This device ID is already assigned to another senior citizen. Use an available device or verify the wearable hardware ID.
errors.saveFailed: The senior citizen could not be saved. Check the data or try again.

deleteSeniorCitizenDialog.title: Delete Senior Citizen
deleteSeniorCitizenDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this senior citizen? This action cannot be undone.

unassignSeniorCitizenDialog.title: Unassign Senior Citizen
unassignSeniorCitizenDialog.message: Do you want to unassign this senior citizen from the caregiver? The senior citizen will remain registered in the system.

alert.noDeviceMessage: No device is associated with this senior citizen.
alert.hintAssignDevice: Please make sure the senior citizen has an assigned device.

statistics.noDeviceMessage: No device is associated with this senior citizen.
statistics.hintAssignDevice: Please make sure the senior citizen has an assigned device.

caregiver.title: Caregiver
caregiver.emailHint: Email will be automatically generated with the institutional domain
caregiver.imageUrlError: Must be a valid image URL
caregiver.ageHint: Age must be a whole number between 21 and 65.
caregiver.phoneHint: Digits only (no spaces, letters, or symbols).

errors.emailInvalid: is required and must be valid
errors.cannotAssignToDoctor: This senior citizen is already assigned to a doctor. Cannot be assigned to a caregiver (mutual exclusion).
errors.formInvalidSummary: There are errors in the form. Please fix the highlighted fields before saving.
errors.duplicateRegistration: Registration error: a caregiver with this name or email is already registered in your organization. Please review the data and try again.
errors.duplicateEmail: A caregiver with this email is already registered in your organization. Use a different email or review existing staff.
errors.duplicateFullName: A caregiver with the same full name is already registered in your organization. Change the name or review existing staff.
errors.saveFailed: The caregiver could not be saved. Check the data or try again.
errors.ageTooYoung: The caregiver must be at least 21 years old.
errors.ageTooOld: The caregiver cannot be older than 65.
errors.phoneDigitsOnly: The phone number may only contain digits (no letters or special characters).

deleteCaregiverDialog.title: Delete Caregiver
deleteCaregiverDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this caregiver?

errors.emailRequired: Email is required and must be valid
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

login.staffPasswordHint: If you were registered by your organization, your initial password is usually the same as your email address.

errors.emailRequired: Email is required and must be valid

billingInformation.title: Billing information
billingInformation.terms: By providing your card information, you allow MediTrack to charge your card for future payments in accordance with their terms.

errors.institutionNameTaken: That institution name is already registered. Please try another.

senior-citizen-registration.deviceIdTooLarge: Device ID is too large. Maximum allowed value is {{maxValue}}. Please use a smaller device ID.
